prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为7473→8830→7236→15590→6505。2024年因新高考改革（物理类含不限选科组）位次异常后移至15590，2025年迅速回归至6505，近两年波动较大，2025年基准位次约6505名；2021–2025年物理类计划分别为31→33→29→27→25人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划25人，与2025年持平，计划稳定未对竞争产生额外影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学为211、双一流高校，软科主榜2026年排名第46名，近年排名稳定在40–46名区间，属中上流211，综合实力强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件—男大学生恶意利用女同学照片），但抖音热度总排名第46位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，整体关注度尚可；2021–2025年未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中体育学A-、药学A-，共2个A-学科；材料科学与工程、临床医学、法学等学科实力亦较强，与招生专业关联度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，与苏州大学物理类招生专业高度匹配；江西省2026年物理类考生约26.79万人，较2025年26.64万人微增约0.55%，竞争略有加剧；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，地处长三角经济发达地区，对江西省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在江西省招生规模较小（25人），属跨省招生，地域偏好对报考热度有一定正向影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6505、招生计划持平、考生规模微增、声誉偏负面但抖音关注度尚可、工科专业热度高、地域吸引力强等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年略有后移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约6535名，区间6035–7035名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 7473 → 8830 → 7236 → 15590 → 6505. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao reform (Physics Category includes unrestricted subject groups), the ranking abnormally shifted to 15590, but quickly returned to 6505 in 2025, showing significant fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6505. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 31 → 33 → 29 → 27 → 25, showing a gradual slight decrease year by year. The 2026 plan is 25, unchanged from 2025, stable and not causing additional competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked 46th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 40–46 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities with strong comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (campus safety incident—male college student maliciously using female classmates' photos), but Douyin popularity ranks 46th overall (relatively popular), with high short video exposure and moderate overall attention. No significant enrollment gaps were recorded from 2021 to 2025. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 2 A- disciplines: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-. Disciplines like Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Law are also relatively strong, highly correlated with enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended, well-matched with Soochow University's Physics Category enrollment majors. In 2026, Jiangxi Province has approximately 267,900 Physics Category examinees, a slight increase of about 0.55% from 266,400 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal to Jiangxi examinees. The university's enrollment scale in Jiangxi is small (25), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference has a certain positive impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 6505, unchanged enrollment plan, slight increase in examinee numbers, slightly negative reputation but moderate Douyin attention, high popularity of engineering majors, and strong regional appeal, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward (slightly intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6535, with a range of 6035–7035.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6035–7035, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, etc.) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 6035), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 7035), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
